notes: ITP 2024 Geroscience study: 12% male mouse lifespan extension at all 3 ITP sites; p=0.003; no female effect; most rigorous animal longevity platform available
PMC review on astaxanthin as putative geroprotector; covers FOXO3 activation, blood-brain barrier crossing, oxidative stress mechanisms; narrative review not meta-analysis
Examine.com evidence summary; covers human RCT evidence for skin, inflammation, and exercise; well-maintained evidence database
2021 Nutrients meta-analysis of 9 RCTs; significant improvements in skin hydration, elasticity, firmness, and wrinkle depth with 4-12mg/day astaxanthin; directly supports skin-health benefit claim
